description: Auth system classes — roles, permissions, users, sessions, credentials

classes.name: Application
classes.description: A registered application that users can authenticate against. Each app has its own modules, roles, scopes, and settings.

props.label: Default App
props.description: Fallback app when no app_id specified in requests

props.label: Modules
props.description: Feature modules registered for this app

props.label: Scopes
props.description: Action scopes defined for this app

classes.name: Module
classes.description: A feature module within an application. Groups related permissions together (e.g. 'projects', 'diagrams', 'ai').

classes.name: Permission
classes.description: A granular permission on a module (e.g. 'view', 'create', 'update', 'delete'). Permissions are assigned to roles.

classes.name: Role
classes.description: A named role within an application (e.g. 'admin', 'user', 'viewer'). Roles group permissions and are assigned to users per app.

classes.name: User
classes.description: A human user account with authentication credentials, MFA settings, and per-app role assignments.

props.label: Phone Verified
props.description: Whether phone number has been verified via OTP

props.label: TOTP Enabled
props.description: Whether time-based OTP is enabled for this user

props.label: Locked Until
props.description: Account locked until this timestamp (null = not locked)

classes.name: Person
classes.description: A human user (extends auth:user). Inherits all user properties.

classes.name: Service Account
classes.description: A machine/service account for API automation (extends auth:user). Uses API key instead of password.

props.label: API Key Prefix
props.description: First 8 chars of API key for identification

props.label: Last Used
props.description: Timestamp of last successful API key authentication

props.label: Description
props.description: What this service account is used for

classes.name: User App Access
classes.description: Junction entity linking a user to an application with a specific role. One per user-app combination.

props.label: Application
props.description: Application the user has access to

props.label: Role
props.description: Role assigned to user for this app

props.label: Active
props.description: Whether this access grant is active

classes.name: Session
classes.description: An active authentication session with JWT access token tracking and refresh token for renewal.

props.label: Refresh Token
props.description: UUID refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

props.label: Access Token JTI
props.description: JWT ID of the current access token

props.label: User Agent
props.description: Client user agent at session creation

classes.name: OTP Request
classes.description: A one-time password verification request. Tracks the OTP flow (register, login, password_reset), delivery type, and verification state.

props.label: User
props.description: User this OTP is for (null for pre-registration)

props.label: Flow
props.description: Which auth flow triggered this OTP

props.label: OTP Hash
props.description: Bcrypt hash of the OTP code

props.label: Token
props.description: UUID token for client to reference this OTP request

classes.name: Scope
classes.description: An action scope that defines authentication behavior for a specific operation (login, register, password_reset). Controls MFA requirements and response payload.

props.label: Require MFA
props.description: Whether this scope enforces multi-factor authentication

props.label: MFA Types
props.description: Allowed MFA methods for this scope

props.label: Payload Variables
props.description: Template variables included in scope response

classes.name: Scope Variable
classes.description: A template variable within a scope payload. Values support {{placeholder}} syntax resolved against app settings and context.

classes.name: Auth Setting
classes.description: A configuration setting for the auth system. Settings can be global (app_id=null) or per-app. Per-app settings override global ones.

props.label: Value
props.description: Setting value (stored as string, interpreted by context)

props.label: Application
props.description: App this setting applies to (null = global default)

props.label: Public
props.description: Whether this setting is exposed in public API responses

classes.name: Messaging Provider
classes.description: Configuration for an external messaging service (SMS gateway, email API, push notification). Extends @provider with messaging-specific settings.

props.label: Active
props.description: Whether this provider is currently enabled

props.label: Default
props.description: Default provider for its message type

classes.name: Messaging Log
classes.description: Record of a message sent through a messaging provider (OTP delivery, notification, etc.).

props.label: Template Data
props.description: Template variables used to render the message

props.label: Request Payload
props.description: Raw request sent to provider API

classes.name: Audit Log
classes.description: Security audit trail entry. Records all authentication events — login, logout, registration, password changes, permission checks, and failed attempts.

props.label: User
props.description: User who triggered the action (null for anonymous)

props.label: Machine
props.description: Service account that triggered the action

props.label: Token Payload
props.description: Decoded JWT payload at time of action

classes.name: Credential
classes.description: Secure storage for API keys, tokens, secrets. Server-only fields for sensitive data.

classes.name: Signing Policy
classes.description: Per-scope mutation signing configuration. Defines which identity fields are stamped on mutations and whether audit logging is required. One policy per class pattern; the default policy ('*') applies universally.

props.label: Class Pattern
props.description: Glob/regex pattern of class IDs this policy applies to. '*' = all classes. Examples: 'ai:*', '@action', 'user'.

props.label: Require User
props.description: Reject mutations that have no user_id in context. Enforces authenticated writes.

props.label: Require Agent
props.description: Reject mutations that have no agent_id in context. Enforces agent attribution.

props.label: Stamp created_by
props.description: Automatically stamp created_by (user_id) and created_by_agent (agent_id) on object creation.

props.label: Stamp updated_by
props.description: Automatically stamp updated_by (user_id) and updated_by_agent (agent_id) on every update.

props.label: Audit Enabled
props.description: Write an @audit_entry record for every matching mutation (create, update, delete).

props.label: Include Changes in Audit
props.description: Store the full field-level diff ({old, new} per changed field) in the audit entry. Disable for high-volume classes to reduce storage.

classes.name: Audit Entry
classes.description: Immutable audit record written after every object mutation (create, update, delete). Captures who made the change, when, and what changed. Never deleted — append-only audit trail.

props.label: Target Class
props.description: The class_id of the object that was mutated.

props.label: Object ID
props.description: The id of the object that was mutated.

props.label: Mutation Type
props.description: Type of mutation: create | update | delete.

props.label: User ID
props.description: ID of the authenticated user who triggered the mutation. Null for system/anonymous writes.

props.label: Agent ID
props.description: ID of the agent (AI or automated system) that performed the mutation. Null for direct user writes.

props.label: Session ID
props.description: Optional session/request correlation ID for grouping related mutations.

props.label: Signed At
props.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this audit entry was written (server time).

props.label: Changes
props.description: Field-level diff: {field_key: {old: ..., new: ...}}. Only populated when audit_include_changes is true on the active policy.

props.label: Policy ID
props.description: ID of the @signing_policy that matched this mutation.
